name: King Ranch Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Fryer chicken                       1 cn Cream of mushroom soup
1 medium Onion chopped                      12 Tortillas cut in pieces
3/4 cup Chopped celery                      1 can Ro-tel tomatoes
1 tsp Salt                                1 cn Cream of chicken soup
1 can Cream of chicken soup               1 c Sharp cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil chicken, onion, celery, and salt until the chicken is tender.
2. Remove the chicken from the broth and let it cool. Once cooled, remove the bones and chop the chicken.
3. Reduce the broth to about 1-1/2 cups, then add the soups and mix well.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Arrange tortilla pieces in the bottom of a buttered 8 x 12 inch casserole dish.
6. Cover the tortilla pieces with chicken chunks.
7. Sprinkle green peppers over the chicken.
8. Cover with Ro-tel tomatoes.
9. Pour the soup mixture over everything.
10. Cover with foil and bake for 35 to 40 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and remove the foil.
12. Sprinkle with cheese, return to the oven, and cook until the cheese is bubbly.
13. Serve hot.
